LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-08-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF TYREE BOOKER'S MOTION TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE ENTIRE ACTION, INCLUDING CLASS ACTION ALLEGATIONS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.7, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Dismiss Without Prejudice The Entire Action, Including Class Action Allegations Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.7
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEXANDER K. SPELLMAN, Esq. of Blackstone Law, APC (Tel: 310-622-4278) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF TYREE BOOKER's Motion To Dismiss Without Prejudice The Entire Action, Including Class Action Allegations Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.7.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss without prejudice the entire action, including class action allegations pursuant to" CRC 3.770 is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
